name: Ron Gravino
subject: Status: Not Active
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter - I'm the treasurer for Chris Christie for President. I don't email very often, but we have a need and I wanted you to hear it from me. Our End of Quarter fundraising deadline is coming up and it's a critical time for the campaign.

I'm supposed to track our fundraising and I noticed that your name wasn't in our record of supporters. I know it's a cliche, but every dollar really does count. Can you help? **[Donate $3 or more right now](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/ct/44107187:69Jz98LYN:m:1:1516426255:FCF535BC840EDCB71314CA0029712212:r)** and help us reach our goal before the quarter ends.

**Email ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Christie Supporter Status: Not Active**
**Become a Supporter Below:**
**[Suggested Donation Amount: $3>>>](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/ct/44107187:69Jz98LYN:m:1:1516426255:FCF535BC840EDCB71314CA0029712212:r)**
****
****
Every step is critical right now while we're in a sea of GOP candidates. We're counting on your support! Can I update your record with a **[donation of just $3 or more?](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/ct/44107187:69Jz98LYN:m:1:1516426255:FCF535BC840EDCB71314CA0029712212:r)**
It takes an army of people just like you to support a candidate. Thank you for being on Team Christie - let's get him all the way to the White House!
Thank you,

Ron Gravino
Treasurer
Chris Christie 2016
P.S. Can you **[send this to friends and family](https://echo7.bluehornet.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=8889383&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=5ce5038333962eab80cc9231e5544d6b)** who I should add to the list of Team Christie?

[](http://echo7.bluehornet.com/ct/44107188:69Jz98LYN:m:1:1516426255:FCF535BC840EDCB71314CA0029712212:r)

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Breaking: Boehner Resigning (Tea Party takeover?)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
**BREAKING NEWS: Speaker of the House John Boehner RESIGNING.**
Friend -- There's big news coming out of Washington this morning. John Boehner is resigning as Speaker of the House. That's right, the Speaker has been muscled out by Tea Party extremists.

[**With the Tea Party on the verge of a total takeover of the House, it 's never been more important for Democrats to take back the Senate. Can we count on you for $10 today to help power Katie's campaign to defeat Pat Toomey?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8156081498546503680/1869295111544766464?refcode=E50925)

Today's news reminds us just how extreme the Republican Party has become. With the Tea Party showing no signs of backing down, we need to double-down in our support for strong Democrats like Katie.

**[Pitch in $10 right away and help Katie take back the Senate.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8156081498546503680/1869295111544766464?refcode=E50925)**

Thanks,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8156081498546503680/1869295111544766464?refcode=E50925)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8156081498546503680/1797237517506838528).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Congressman Mick Mulvaney
subject: One of Washington's largest problems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

I learned very quickly that I'd have few allies in my fight against reckless spending and big government.

While lots of folks use the word Republican, there are few true conservatives. I can say with confidence that my friend and ally, Rand Paul, is a real conservative who hasn't been afraid to take on the Washington establishment -- however unpopular that may be.

**[Will you agree to Stand with Rand by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 before the September 30th deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622786:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)**?

Rand is a doctor, not a career politician.

I think one of the largest problems in Washington is that we have too many career politicians.

Rand and I have fought for term limits in hopes that we can get real people, who have real world experience, to come to Washington and shake things up.

Rand has led the fight to defund Planned Parenthood, his tax plan would abolish the IRS and destroy the 70,000 page tax code, and he's working to return our country to the principles of liberty and limited government.

I'm proud to Stand with Rand, and **[I hope you can join me by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 before the September 30th deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622786:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)**.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622786:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?q3&sr=rhf092515a2")
**CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622787:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622788:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622789:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622790:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622786:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)

In Liberty,

Congressman Mick Mulvaney (R-SC)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30622786:suJ1sMmkN:m:1:879035888:DDB3611312897CBF0D2068C937A2DD0E:r)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: We’re under the microscope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I need you with me. | Friend --

I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.

Let me know you're with me. Can you donate $1 or more in the next six days?

**September 30th is a critical FEC fundraising deadline that will be reported on and scrutinized, so I need to know you’ve got my back:**
| | [**Donate**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM2MDAwMTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNjg5NzYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Josh Wolf
subject: BREAKING: Boehner OUT Tea Party IN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **BREAKING:_Boehner Will Resign From Congress_**
\-- _NYT_ , 9/25/2015 Friends,

**Boehner is GONE.**

Don't get too excited. Even though his tenure was one of the most dysfunctional in history, he was what passes for "moderate" among House Republicans. He attempted (and failed) to keep the Tea Party from doing too much damage.

Now that he's leaving, the **_next Speaker of the House could be a legitimate, dyed-in-the-wool Tea Party radical._** If you thought Congress was dysfunctional before, just wait until October. There's no telling what a Tea Party Speaker would do.

This makes turning Florida blue, and getting the Senate back into Democratic hands, even more important. **There is only one person who can deliver Florida for the Democrats: Patrick Murphy.**

We need your help immediately. We are $20,000 away from our goal. The deadline is in 5 days. [**Are you in to stop the Tea Party?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b3/738133e4/3a88768f/7f8de79c/653722748/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150925?refcode=pme150925_m&recurring=true")

Patrick knows how to defeat the Tea Party. He won against one of the original Tea Party darlings Allen West in 2012.

He will be a champion in the Senate for middle-class families against what is sure to be a Tea Party onslaught. But we need to get him to the Senate first. [**Will you step up now?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b3/738133e4/3a88768f/7f8de79c/653722748/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150925?refcode=pme150925_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for your support,

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b3/738133e4/3a88768f/7f8de79d/653722748/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b3/738133e4/3a88768f/7f8de79e/653722748/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b3/738133e4/3a88768f/7f8de79f/653722748/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

| Dear Friend,

Last week in the second Republican debate, Senator Cruz passionately made the case for why he should be the next President of the United States, [and I wanted to make sure you saw it](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvC9pcR6vrGj3-2BoihnwnakbPOSNIk1jiKrq3FQAhVMXpcQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEeNYi30nKizdPINWDlPQjCwAQ2C5Yc3klKW4DzqNpKqCd45QXelfpbhlKQSrlzCx5ViENhg3XIriBKZCYg8Ek5ipvSwzvNzNjDy-2Fn6H7VmdbMOYE6a4M-2FCisn4ArLIDDsRkEQAUlsSmD-2BhxV6p-2FX4vqv3TyHjNO7siB-2FV1oG11Zqacg5jDtTEd53O6Q1K3-2BcfXpdvoiH1wNnjvjo-2FLFR5gs4h277Hf6dZn-2FNGt1GbXpAq9qH24MAMdPs5nX1c91yz9JEuZG-2F3z2M4MVXSWekhI8u9-2B-2FIZnMj9asgtj6KI1tmco4ywJes5PxfDlNl5QIPGeuGTxzLEfA7qFXo7Fk7m0u0tkDA5ZYktymPp7EmZBEGuDhPJ59NjJOguQK7uINZM-3D).

Now, more than ever, [we need a consistent conservative in the White House](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvC9pcR6vrGj3-2BoihnwnakbPOSNIk1jiKrq3FQAhVMXpcQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEeNYi30nKizdPINWDlPQjCF90Jvnxtf9v5JGthNFA6tCo74Dg1gpptOj4Nf9NevCxxGDHSFgZz0UTeeQZL-2FWSUdb73eEm9dps6OIICgO9RKfGDG0SztgQq8pX3paGwg4A7GtDzy6zvB4RjYdqrHC26f5HQfynpyldTkuc7dvfoiYc0wOqH2R4gUltuTbBjMkTAs6UyGA2SkyvTlVnfifSfP2xdlG-2BTRLcNVTM1VpFGQLydlnpdCEFfT20VHVpvQq4u26KAgBKDBEpQAz5yZybJ8czgio6ZUR9CumQBod8ZI-2F1UdvQzlmqcJLIMXxcF1FxYnXwUq7NQag-2BqDxtWSS7OiddjatYEtPpkhY8ildjw77K8EYARTf8BbptZto4FfZw-3D).

One who we can trust to put U.S. National Security ahead of partisan political objectives. One who we can trust to take on Washington politicians in both parties. One who we can trust to do what he says he will do.

[**That man is Ted Cruz**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvC9pcR6vrGj3-2BoihnwnakbPOSNIk1jiKrq3FQAhVMXpcQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEeNYi30nKizdPINWDlPQjC33Xu43zS2dz3wfoqP7WNIeTn05BQ81n8-2BKNzR86U-2FsXFk8h2yzmer2GnyA57o4BT88MoBKHd9QreotphdgP6OVav9lq0490XroiGfqPXd8jJIhqMIglF6i-2FUl-2BnhIY2l6wzhNE-2FS7MBaS-2FdTx0PQz-2FPfXd3iRtBkJqoeXeqbsoLQFbz4xD5EXNPtbXpNwR88TdtNWtQZBpEhXxiASLUYBP5aXfB7ZG6qa1JpQuInuaMmJkK-2FVd0SnkS1Nsiaml60Ci1jeqOp8lwsp0CLftzo-2FgMmpyJdam2pXF7ZeD97Wpbt0LTKMsA1if08-2FHPUL36shFVHkwSMlaH22xeNVmR4io3R3bA2JhV42YY2DlrGuMk-3D).

For Liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political Director
Cruz for President

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: The insiders are stunned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

"BOEHNER RESIGNS FROM CONGRESS."

My jaw dropped when I heard the news earlier this morning.

I know Washington insiders must be beside themselves with the unexpected news.

If you want to send a message that we need more Republican leaders who will stand and fight for Republican principles, now is the time to take action.

**[Will you please contribute as generously as you can to my campaign's End of Quarter Fundraising Blitz right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)**?

With members of the media and Big Government insiders sniffing around to see my campaign's next financial reports, now is your time to show you're FED UP.

If you want the next Speaker of the House -- and the next President -- to be a true limited government champion, please act right away.

I'm running for President to deliver on my detailed plan to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back by:

>>> Ending the IRS with my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax that will slash taxes for all Americans as everyone pays one low rate;

>>> Repealing ALL of ObamaCare;

>>> Kicking career politicians out of office with term limits;

>>> Stopping illegal NSA spying once-and-for-all.

But I need your help to get this message out to voters.

**[With the FEC's September 30th End of Quarter fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on you to please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, Capitol Hill is RED HOT right now!

From ObamaCare, to illegal executive amnesty, to funding Planned Parenthood, surrender was always the first option for many of my Republican colleagues.

As a result, our party's nominating contest is wide open as voters are rejecting the establishment candidates the media thought would cakewalk to victory.

Fellow Conservative, I'm the one candidate in this race with a real plan and a track record of delivering on the promises I make.

When voters hear my message of individual liberty and see my proven track record, they join my campaign to defeat the Washington Machine.

Our liberty message is resonating all across the country.

I see it every day when I'm out meeting voters on the campaign trail.

Everywhere I go, the crowds continue to grow.

Hundreds of patriots attend each event -- and they enthusiastically respond to my plan to defeat the Washington Machine.

After my strong debate performance last week, I proved my campaign had the organizational strength and grassroots support necessary to be the Republican nominee by winning the Mackinac Island straw poll in Michigan -- the largest straw poll of the year!

But I must have the resources to bust through the media's wall and get my message out to as many voters as possible.

And with the September 30th reporting deadline rapidly approaching, I need your help TODAY.

This is the most important deadline I will face as a candidate. It's critical I have a strong showing.

**[So will you please give as generously as you can to my campaign with the September 30th End of Quarter Deadline rapidly approaching](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)**?

Perhaps you can give $20.16 or even more?

But whatever amount you can give, please act at once.

**[I'm counting on your support, Fellow Conservative](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)**.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?q3&sr=rhf092515a3")
**CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623794:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623795:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623796:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623797:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623793:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623798:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623799:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30623800:s9qopMmNb:m:1:879035888:14907C1C37E9C2E4BAB68BD20E5AE68F:r)

name: Team Pataki
subject: The Top 10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/a2688dec67/ace65cf3c9/15efce070e/sc=925eb

Dear Friend,

All of our hard work is finally paying off. According to two recent
polls--one from Fox News and the other from Quinnipiac--Governor
Pataki is on the verge of cracking the top 10.

Both polls show that, among the candidates in the so-called "happy
hour" debates, Governor Pataki is the only one whose numbers got a
boost. Governor Pataki is now just a single point from being within
the top 10 in this race.

As you know, cracking the top 10 is incredibly important. A top 10
showing will get the Governor in the prime time debates going
forward, and is a huge sign that our momentum is growing!

To keep this momentum going, join our campaign with a $10, $20, $50,
$100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 contribution today. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/a2688dec67/ace65cf3c9/470d39d043/sc=925eb

We are finally reaching the serious part of this campaign. The summer
of Trump is over (thankfully!). Voters are looking for a serious
candidate, and we know that Governor Pataki is the man for the job.

Help Governor Pataki and his campaign by making a $10, $20, $50,

clean_body: - Dear Friend, All of our hard work is finally paying off. According to two recent polls--one from Fox News and the other from Quinnipiac--Governor Pataki is on the verge of cracking the top 10. Both polls show that, among the candidates in the so-called "happy hour" debates, Governor Pataki is the only one whose numbers got a boost. Governor Pataki is now just a single point from being within the top 10 in this race. As you know, cracking the top 10 is incredibly important. A top 10 showing will get the Governor in the prime time debates going forward, and is a huge sign that our momentum is growing! To keep this momentum going, join our campaign with a $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 contribution today. - We are finally reaching the serious part of this campaign. The summer of Trump is over (thankfully!). Voters are looking for a serious candidate, and we know that Governor Pataki is the man for the job. Help Governor Pataki and his campaign by making a $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 contribution today. - Thank you. Team Pataki P.S. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Fwd: BREAKING: Boehner OUT Tea Party IN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend --

Over the past nine months, we've seen the havoc the Tea Party can cause with a relatively small amount of influence.

**_I don 't want to know what disasters they'll cause now that they've gotten Boehner out of the way and have even MORE power._**

If the Tea Party takes over the House, the Senate will be the only thing standing between their radical policies and the American people. **We have to win Florida and take back the Senate.**

[**The FEC deadline is coming up soon. Very soon. Make a contribution right now toward our $50,000 goal and help us keep fighting.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b1/738133e4/3a8d2b89/7f8c177e/1769201777/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150925pm?refcode=pme150925pm_m&recurring=true")

Thanks.

Patrick \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Josh Wolf
Date: Fri, Sep 25, 2015
Subject: BREAKING: Boehner OUT Tea Party IN **BREAKING:_Boehner Will Resign From Congress_**
\-- _NYT_ , 9/25/2015 Friends,

**Boehner is GONE.**

Don't get too excited. Even though his tenure was one of the most dysfunctional in history, he was what passes for "moderate" among House Republicans. He attempted (and failed) to keep the Tea Party from doing too much damage.

Now that he's leaving, the **_next Speaker of the House could be a legitimate, dyed-in-the-wool Tea Party radical._** If you thought Congress was dysfunctional before, just wait until October. There's no telling what a Tea Party Speaker would do.

This makes turning Florida blue, and getting the Senate back into Democratic hands, even more important. **There is only one person who can deliver Florida for the Democrats: Patrick Murphy.**

We need your help immediately. We are $20,000 away from our goal. The deadline is in 5 days. [**Are you in to stop the Tea Party?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b1/738133e4/3a8d2b89/7f8c177e/1769201777/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150925pm?refcode=pme150925pm_m&recurring=true")

Patrick knows how to defeat the Tea Party. He won against one of the original Tea Party darlings Allen West in 2012.

He will be a champion in the Senate for middle-class families against what is sure to be a Tea Party onslaught. But we need to get him to the Senate first. [**Will you step up now?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b1/738133e4/3a8d2b89/7f8c177e/1769201777/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150925pm?refcode=pme150925pm_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for your support,

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20b1/738133e4/3a8d2b89/7f8c177f/1769201777/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
